injuries.comment: The Canadiens announced on Friday (Nov. 14) that Newhook underwent surgery for a broken ankle and will miss four months.
The Canadiens said on Saturday (Oct. 25) that Laine underwent core muscle surgery and will be out of action for 3-4 months.
Beecher did not play Thursday's (Nov. 13) game against Ottawa.
The Bruins listed Mittelstadt on Monday (Nov. 10) as week-to-week, according to Scott McLaughlin of WEEI.
